title: Safe Evaluation Result
description: Deterministic contract for customer-safe agent evaluation outcomes.

evaluation_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation run.

request_id.description: Correlation ID for the specific request being evaluated.

task_completion.description: True if the agent successfully completed the requested task.

safe_tool_use.description: True if the agent called tools correctly and within permitted boundaries.

groundedness_score.description: Score indicating how well the response is grounded in the provided context.

safe_failure_behavior.description: True if failures resulted in friendly, non-technical messages.

latency_ms.description: Total end-to-end latency for the evaluated turn.

estimated_cost_usd.description: Estimated cost of the turn in USD.
